notes: Crisp is now a real editor. The app opens straight into the timeline: import clips, arrange and trim them, and use every Crisp feature — Enhance, Looks, Audio effects, Speed, Rotate, Reframe, Stabilize, Reverse — as a tool on any clip, non-destructively with one-click Revert. Type what you want ('make it cinematic', 'mute it') and Crisp does it to the selected clip. Jobs live in a drawer; photos get their own Enhance tool in the media bin.
